caption: A person's hands are seen mixing a light-brown, grainy food substance in a large metal bowl. To the right of the bowl, there is a small white plate and a small red bowl, both containing the same food substance. The scene takes place in a kitchen setting with a light-colored countertop. In the lower left of the frames, a circular inset shows a woman with blonde hair wearing a dark shirt. Throughout the sequence, the hands continue to stir the mixture in the large bowl, causing the food to shift and clump together. Each frame features a logo and the text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" in the upper left corner. The background behind the bowls includes a glimpse of a blue and white patterned wall or cloth.
